nodes.context: French far-right anti-Arab militant group active in the 1970s and 1980s, targeting Algerian properties and individuals.
French far-right paramilitary organization that fought against Algerian independence during the Algerian War.
Algerian-backed militant group involved in conflict in Mauritania, which kidnapped French nationals in 1977.

edges.context: The Charles Martel Group was formed by veterans of the Organisation armée secrète.
The Charles Martel Group kidnapped two Algerians in 1977 as reprisal for Polisario Front's killing and kidnapping of French nationals.
